title: Wire per-step output into WrapupRunner
description:
The WrapupRunner in internal/wrapup/agent_steps.go executes agent wrapup steps but produces no per-step output. Wire RunOutput calls into the execution loop.

Changes to internal/wrapup/agent_steps.go:
1. Add Output *output.RunOutput field to WrapupRunner struct.
2. Before each step: call Output.WrapupAgentStep(index, total, title, 'running').
3. After each step: call Output.WrapupAgentStep(index, total, title, status) where status is completed/failed/escalated.
4. On retry: call Output.Warn('Retrying step %d: %s (attempt %d)', ...).
5. Replace fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr) in saveProgress warning with Output.Warn().

Changes to internal/wrapup/wrapup.go:
1. Pass r.Output to WrapupRunner when constructing it in runAgentWrapupSteps().
2. Replace the bare fmt.Fprintf for 'Running %d agent wrapup steps' with Output call.

Files: internal/wrapup/agent_steps.go, internal/wrapup/wrapup.go
Tests: verify Output methods are called during step execution.
